title: A simple strategy that’s been surprisingly consistent
author: Ok_Beginning_8126
selftext:
I have consistently employed a relatively robust strategy that has enabled me to achieve sustained profitability. Its core philosophy is quite simple: position sizing, diversification, and trend followingcombined with fundamental analysis to carefully select high-quality stocks or ETFs. This strategy allows me to both mitigate the impact of severe market volatility and capture growth opportunities.

If anyone is interested, I've created a free group where I share my strategies. If you're interested, please leave a comment or send me a private message, and I'll invite you to join and share with you.

replies.author: Ok_Beginning_8126
replies.body: I posted here half a month ago, inviting over a hundred people. Everyone knows whether or not I’m a scammerI genuinely extended the invitations and didn't charge a single penny.

comments.author: lanadelreymysteriojr
comments.body: I'm a trading newbie and would like to learn more. Please send me an invitation.

comments.author: orbital
comments.body: Is this something you charge for or require we invest through you? If not, could you send me an invite? Thanks!

replies.author: Ok_Beginning_8126
replies.body: No I simply wanted to invite more experienced individuals to join in for some discussion and exchange of ideas.

replies.author: Ok_Beginning_8126
replies.body: Not at allyou should invest in the stocks you personally favor or those that are currently trending. I’m simply sharing some suggestions.

replies.author: Ok_Beginning_8126
replies.body: I am unable to send you a message. Please send me a message so that I can invite you.

comments.author: Environmental_Two581
comments.body: So are you showing 1-2% per day per trade?
